parameters.content:
## Analyst & Review Platform Tracker

**Setup:**
1. Set G2_COMPANY_SLUG, CAPTERRA_PROFILE_URL env vars for your company and competitors
2. Create YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
3. Set TRACKER_EMAIL_TO env var
4. Schedule: weekly on Monday
5. Manual Trigger uses embedded sample data (no external accounts needed for testing)

**Note:** G2 and Capterra do not have official APIs. This workflow reads their public pages via HTTP Request. If they change their HTML structure, the parsing Code nodes will need updating.
